search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Kept results restricted to lastzwiki.com as requested. Prioritized concrete guide pages over generic home pages. No public-facing claims should be treated as verified from a single wiki source.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster page with character list, levels, faction filters, and equipment sections. Good lead for hero discovery and cross-checking hero names, ranks, and gear categories.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster and basic hero details
claims_to_verify: Equipment types shown on hero pages

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page covering laboratory categories, per-level badge costs, and search by research name. Strong lead for research topic mapping and cost cross-validation.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories and badge cost tables
claims_to_verify: Total badges required for key upgrades

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English home page with navigation to heroes, research, alliances, buildings, and beginner guides. Useful as a hub for further discovery, but less specific than dedicated pages.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to www.last-z.wiki. No matching pages were returned for this query.
search_records.no_results_reason: Empty search results from the allowed domain

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to the approved domain. No indexed results were returned for the query, so there are no discovery leads to report.
search_records.no_results_reason: No search results found on the allowed domain for the specified query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to lastz.fandom.com. Results skewed toward event and hero overview pages; the query phrase 'research events' surfaced the strongest match in Full Preparedness, plus supporting hub/hero pages. No public-claim-ready result should be inferred from a single page.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Event page showing a rotation that includes Age of Science research tasks and Hero Initiative hero-upgrade tasks; useful for event discovery and cross-checking reward themes.
results.primary_user_job: Understand daily event themes tied to research and hero upgrades
claims_to_verify: Research tasks appear in the Age of Science theme
Hero upgrade tasks appear in the Hero Initiative theme
The event rotates on a fixed daily cycle with repeating themes

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events; useful for locating the in-game event entry point and event taxonomy.
results.primary_user_job: Find where events are organized in-game
claims_to_verify: Event Center contains regular and special events
Regular events reset daily at Apocalypse Time 00:00:00

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page listing hero classes and major power factors; useful background for hero-related event mechanics.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero classes and what affects hero power
claims_to_verify: Heroes are main commanders for offensive and defensive actions
Hero power depends on level, stars, skills, equipment, modified vehicle, structure, and technologies

search_records.search_notes: Search on allowed domain returned no matching discovery leads for the specified Packsify Last Z gear guide query. No off-domain results were used.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexable results found on www.packsify.com for the exact site-restricted query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to mmediamreza.com and surfaced multiple Last Z-specific guide pages. Best discovery leads are the three camp/building progression pages; generic alliance/event pages were lower-priority for source triage.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Core unit-building guide with unlock requirements and a level-by-level training cap/speed/power table for Shooter units.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter Camp upgrades and training capacity.

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Core unit-building guide covering Assaulter training, promotion, speed, cap, and power progression.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter Camp upgrades and troop training.
claims_to_verify: Assaulter Camp training cap by level

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Core unit-building guide with level table for Rider training cap, speed, and power progression.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Rider Camp upgrades and troop progression.
